scripts.build:extension: mkdir -p dist/extension/extensions && npx esbuild src/extension/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/extension/extensions/index.js "--external:@aws-sdk/*" && cp scripts/bootstrap dist/extension/extensions/ && chmod +x dist/extension/extensions/bootstrap
scripts.cdk:synth: npm run build:extension && npx cdk synth
scripts.cdk:deploy: npm run build:extension && npx cdk deploy
scripts.cdk:diff: npm run build:extension && npx cdk diff
